messages.content:
Describe how a race condition can occur in this context.

An issue has been discovered in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions before 15.5.7, all versions starting from 15.6 before 15.6.4, all versions starting from 15.7 before 15.7.2. A race condition can lead to verified email forgery and takeover of third-party accounts when using GitLab as an OAuth provider.

A race condition in this context occurs when multiple processes access and manipulate shared data concurrently. In GitLab’s OAuth implementation, this can lead to situations where an attacker can exploit timing discrepancies to forge email verification, thus gaining unauthorized account access.
